PR checks, dependency audit, AI review</size>
No path filter on pull_request (required checks must
All images published via crane copy by digest.
No docker pull/push: reproducible digests guaranteed.
Cosign keyless sign + SBOM attestation on main only.
Validated by verify_approved_lock.py on every PR.
Bot GPG signing of lock commits: deferred (A3 follow-up).
